description: Service Usage is a Google Cloud infrastructure service that lets users list and manage APIs and services in their Google Cloud projects. It is used to enable, disable, and inspect service availability and related operations for Google Cloud resources.
summary: serviceusage.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Service Usage HTTP API for listing, enabling, disabling, and managing services in Google Cloud projects; no GraphQL, MCP, or domain-specific CLI surface was found for this host.
